description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.
425 plugins, 2,810 skills, 200 agents for Claude Code. Open-source marketplace at tonsofskills.com with the ccpi CLI package manager.
Skill Compose is an open-source agent builder and runtime platform for skill-powered agents. No workflow graphs. No CLI.
Open-source agentic schema CLI. Optimised for claude code, gemini, codex and co-pilot. Skills included.
Open-source library of AI agent skills — SKILL.md files for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor
Clinify Blog, in fewer words, is a place where clinify Members write (ranging from the stuff happening at Clinify to the skills they have been learning) and others read.
930+ AI-powered skills and 31 agent plugins for Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, and Perplexity Computer. The largest open-source AI skills library.
CLI open source para gerar skills de alta qualidade
Open-source CLI skills for promptfolio — analyze your AI conversation history locally

CLI tool and AI agent skill for reading and writing ABAP source code and metadata from SAP systems (ECC · S/4HANA · BTP) via the ADT REST API. Supports programs, classes, CDS views, DDIC objects, transport management, Open SQL queries, and object search — with fine-grained permission flags for all write operations.

Jiva is a CLI-first, open source autonomous AI agent and open alternative to Claude. Built in TypeScript with native support for Sarvam-105B and gpt-oss-120b, it autonomously plans and executes tasks from your terminal. Supports MCP servers, a built-in Skills system, and Jiva Personas - a plugin framework fully compatible with Claude Plugins.

A powerful CLI tool that analyzes your GitHub profile to recommend open-source projects tailored to your interests and skills. DevProjectConnector connects you with potential collaborators, helping you grow your skills and expand your network within the open-source community.
Open-source CLI scanner for agentic AI components such as skills, MCP servers, system prompts
First Open Source Aim Trainer and World Builder for FPS players. Built with Three.js to push the limits of skill and design.

This repository is a curated collection of skills, plugins, and automation pipelines designed for Claude Code — Anthropic's CLI for AI-assisted software engineering.  It was built by the engineering and security engineering teams at Phoenix Security and released as open source so that security professionals, DevSecOps engineers, AppSec teams
Open-source collection of Claude skills. Rust CLI tool to discover, search, and install skills that extend Claude's capabilities.
Open-source security skills for AI coding agents. Grounded in OWASP, NIST, MITRE ATT&CK, CIS. Works with Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Codex CLI, OpenClaw, Kiro.
Agent Skills for Happy Hacking Space's open-source security tools. Compatible with Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, and Cursor.
AI-Powered Terminal Assistant - Open-source alternative to Claude Code Skills with cost savings. Supports DeepSeek/Qwen/Ollama & offline mode
Lightweight, fast, open-source desktop web proxy for macOS — HTTP/HTTPS MITM, capture, replay, fuzzer, CLI automation, AI skills

Rapton is a Open Source Project that builds resume for developer's which takes input from users like name, email, education, skills, social profiles, work experience, projects, achievements, and then compile the data to generate a resume of selected template.
Open-source agent skills for Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Codex, Cursor, and Gemini CLI. Connect AI agents to Google Analytics, Search Console, and Drive. From Temi (usetemi.com).
Open-source CLI and agent skills for Prevu — preview/staging environments for coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenHands, even OpenClaw and Hermes Agent

Local-first open-source agent execution platform with CLI runtime, Browser runtime, skill packs, and knowledge packs.

Open-source skills for Claude Code CLI, Claude Desktop, and Claude Code Cowork. Production-tested workflows that turn Claude into a specialized operator for cloud cost optimization, GTM, recruiting, and more.
